meta.title: Size Calculator
header.title: Size Calculator
header.subtitle: Enter your measurements to find the right size
sleeves.info:
Arm warmers — same size as your jersey/jacket. Use the top table.
Knee / leg warmers — same size as your shorts/bibs. Use the bottom table.
result.label: Recommended size
result.borderBadge: On a border between sizes — larger size is recommended
result.invalidInput: Please check your measurements and try again.
result.secondaryNoEffect: Secondary measurement (height) did not affect the final size recommendation.
warn.outOfRange: Entered value ({label}: {value} {unit}) is out of our size table range — showing the nearest available size.
result.border: Your measurement ({measurement}) is exactly on the border between two sizes. The larger size {size} is recommended.
result.outOfRange.below: Your measurement ({measurement}) is below our smallest size. Nearest size: {size}.
result.outOfRange.above: Your measurement ({measurement}) is above our largest size. Nearest size: {size}.
result.extendedReason: Extended size was selected based on the secondary measurement ({secondary}) because value {value} cm exceeded cutoff {cutoff} cm for size {baseSize}.
result.gloves.recommended: Recommended glove size based on hand circumference {value} cm.
result.gloves.children.border: Hand circumference {value} cm is on the border between children glove sizes. The larger size {size} is recommended.
result.gloves.belowAdult: Hand circumference {value} cm is below the adult range. Nearest adult size: {size}.
result.gloves.outOfRange: Hand circumference {value} cm is outside the standard range. Nearest size: {size}.
result.gloves.border: Hand circumference {value} cm is on the border between two glove sizes. The larger size {size} is recommended.
result.shoe.recommended: Recommended shoe cover / sock size for EU shoe size {value}.
result.shoe.outOfRange: EU shoe size {value} is outside the standard range. Nearest size: {size}.
language.label: Language
